name: style-snap
description: Analyze project code to extract naming conventions, formatting style, and import patterns, then generate an Agent-ready style guide.
intent_triggers: 分析這個專案的程式碼風格
生成一份風格指南給 Agent 用
檢查這個檔案是否符合專案風格
看一下團隊的命名慣例是什麼
幫我抓出程式碼風格不一致的地方
analyze the coding style of this project
generate a style guide for my team
check if this file follows project conventions
extract naming conventions from the codebase
幫我產出這個 repo 的 coding style guide

path.description: Project directory or file path to analyze

lang.description: Programming language to analyze (e.g., python, javascript)

output.description: Output file path for the style guide

examples.intent: 分析專案程式碼風格並生成指南
檢查檔案是否符合專案風格
